name: David Martinez
name_kanji: デイビッド・マルティネス
about:
Gender: Male
Age: 17 (Ep 1–6), 18 (Ep 7–10)
Birthdate: 2058
Birthplace: Night City
Affiliation: Arasaka (formerly), Maine's Crew (formerly), David's Crew
Occupation: Student (formerly), Mercenary - Solo
Cyberware: 
David Martinez is the protagonist of the series. He became a mercenary and a member of Maine's edgerunner crew in 2076 when he was involved in a series of harrowing events that resulted in him attaining the status of a Night City legend.
